general.masterLanguages: Master languages naturally with AI tutoring.
general.joinThousands: Join thousands of learners unlocking their potential through personalized tracks, interactive lessons, and real-time chat practice.

hero.subtitle: Master Amharic, Swahili, Afan Oromo, and more organically through immersive AI conversations and personalized learning paths.

features.tagline: Everything you need to reach fluency
features.description: Our AI-powered platform adapts to your learning style, providing exactly what you need to progress faster.

feature1.title: AI-Powered Lessons
feature1.desc: Dynamic curriculum that shapes itself around your strengths and weaknesses in real-time.

feature2.title: Personalized Paths
feature2.desc: Follow structured tracks designed to take you from beginner to fluent naturally.

feature3.title: Real-time Chat Tutor
feature3.desc: Practice conversing with an AI companion that corrects your grammar and vocabulary instantly.

step1.title: Choose your languages
step1.desc: Select your native language and the target language you want to master.

step2.title: Learn the fundamentals
step2.desc: Progress through an AI-curated track of vocabulary, grammar, and pronunciation lessons.

step3.title: Practice in real-life scenarios
step3.desc: Chat with your AI tutor in immersive role-play situations to build conversational confidence.

step4.title: Take Quizes and Evaluate
step4.desc: After every lessons take quizzes and record experiences earned through the levels.

step5.title: Get Your Certificate For Completion
step5.desc: When you finish all the lessons under a track get verifiable certificate.

t1.text: EduLingua completely changed how I learn. The AI chat feels like talking to a real native speaker from Addis Ababa!
t1.name: Abebe B.

t2.text: The personalized learning paths helped me master Kiswahili grammar faster than I ever thought possible. Haki!
t2.name: Zahara M.

t3.text: Finally an app that respects regional languages. The contextual learning makes Afaan Oromoo so much easier to grasp.
t3.name: Kofi A.

chat.title: EduLingua Tutor
chat.subtitle: Native Speaker & Polyglot
chat.welcome: Hujambo {{name}}! I'm your East African language tutor. I can help you practice Swahili, Amharic, Afan Oromo, or any other regional language. How can I assist you today?
chat.limitReached: Daily free limit reached. Come back tomorrow or upgrade for unlimited access.
chat.placeholder: Message your AI tutor... (Enter to send)
chat.limitPlaceholder: Daily limit reached. Upgrade to continue.
chat.error: Sorry, I'm having trouble connecting. Please try again in a moment.
chat.rephrase: I didn't understand that. Can you rephrase?
